rule: An analog may be selected from source morphology/projection ledgers, not from residual shape.
NGC4013 expdisk+WVO remains prospective-only and cannot be retroactively promoted.
Existing scored analogues can serve as references, but not as fresh holdout validation.
A fresh candidate needs source-native regular disk carrier plus independent vertical/warp/onset support.
Quiet disks and stress/path-closure cases are controls, not forced WVO successes.
